name: Palmer Wind Farm

timeline.title: Financial Investment Decision reached
timeline.detail: First CIS-winning wind project to reach FID. 288 MW (40 Vestas turbines). EPC: BMD. CIS agreement + AGL PPA. $13M+ community benefits. Construction mid-2026.

scheme_contracts.execution_notes: FID 9 Jan 2026 with 15-yr AGL PPA (~half of output). Construction mid-2026, ops ~Dec 2028. Capacity increased 274→288 MW at FID (40 turbines with modified design). FIRST non-battery CIS generator to reach construction (of ~69 awards).

operational_notes: FID reached 9 January 2026 with a 15-year PPA to AGL Energy. First non-battery CIS generator to reach construction (of ~69 CIS awards to that date). Construction commenced mid-2026.

timeline_events.title: FID reached with 15-yr AGL PPA — first non-battery CIS generator to reach construction
timeline_events.detail: Tilt Renewables reached final investment decision on Palmer Wind Farm (274 MW SA) on 9 January 2026, underpinned by a 15-year PPA with AGL Energy. Milestone: first non-battery CIS generator (of ~69 awards) to reach construction, per RE / Energy Global.

sources.title: Tilt Renewables approves Palmer Wind Farm for construction in 2026
